Order copy, judgment stage, post-hearing action and legal outcome visibility for advocates.

Advocate Home Case Queue Hearings Verdict Review Challenge Queue

Verdict and Order Review Layer

HNI WORLD OS > Legalnomics > Advocate > Orders

Order Copy Review Ready Post-Hearing

Awaiting Order Copy

12

Cases where final copy upload is pending.

Under Review

7

Judgments being checked by legal team.

Closure Ready

4

Cases ready for closure or settlement wrap-up.

Challenge Suggested

3

AI or legal review suggests appeal or challenge.

Order Review Checklist

  • Upload order or judgment copy
  • Map matter against pleadings and evidence
  • Review granted vs rejected prayers
  • Check limitation period for appeal or revision
  • Mark closure, compliance or challenge route

AI Legal Review Direction

  • Highlight contradictory findings
  • Flag procedural irregularity
  • Identify missing issue framing
  • Map challenge-ready grounds
  • Escalate to challenge queue if required
